eda-text-mahin

Mahin Roddur

2026-04-02

library(here)
## Warning: package 'here' was built under R version 4.5.3
## here() starts at C:/Users/roddu/Downloads/glassdoor-company-reviews
data <- read.csv(here("data", "processed", "glassdoor_reviews_cleaned.csv"))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

reviews_per_company <- data %>%
  group_by(company_name) %>%
  summarise(n_reviews = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Top 10 companies
top_companies <- reviews_per_company %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reviews)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

ggplot(top_companies, aes(x = reorder(company_name, n_reviews), y = n_reviews)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n_reviews), hjust = 0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Companies by Number of Reviews",
    x = "Company",
    y = "Number of Reviews"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

reviews_per_sector <- data %>%
  group_by(sector) %>%
  summarise(n_reviews = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(reviews_per_sector, aes(x = reorder(sector, n_reviews), y = n_reviews)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n_reviews), hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Reviews per Sector",
    x = "Sector",
    y = "Number of Reviews"
  )

Word Count Histograms

library(stringr)

count_words <- function(x) {
  x <- str_squish(x)
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == "", 0, str_count(x, "\\S+"))
}

wc_df <- data %>%
  transmute(
    summary_wc = count_words(summary),
    pros_wc = count_words(review_pros),
    cons_wc = count_words(review_cons),
    advice_wc = count_words(advice_to_management)
  )

wc_long <- wc_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "column",
    values_to = "word_count"
  )


ggplot(wc_long, aes(x = word_count)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  facet_wrap(~ column, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Word Count Distribution by Review Field",
    x = "Word Count",
    y = "Frequency"
  )

## Mean word count vs overall rating

wc_rating_df <- data %>%
  mutate(
    summary_wc = count_words(summary),
    pros_wc = count_words(review_pros),
    cons_wc = count_words(review_cons),
    advice_wc = count_words(advice_to_management)
  )

wc_rating_long <- wc_rating_df %>%
  select(rating_overall, summary_wc, pros_wc, cons_wc, advice_wc) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(summary_wc, pros_wc, cons_wc, advice_wc),
    names_to = "column",
    values_to = "word_count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    column = recode(column,
      summary_wc = "Summary",
      pros_wc = "Pros",
      cons_wc = "Cons",
      advice_wc = "Advice"
    )
  )

wc_rating_summary <- wc_rating_long %>%
  group_by(column, rating_overall) %>%
  summarise(mean_wc = mean(word_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(wc_rating_summary, aes(x = rating_overall, y = mean_wc)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ column, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Word Count by Overall Rating",
    x = "Overall Rating",
    y = "Average Word Count"
  )

## Sentiment with Distillbert

clean_text_for_bert <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_replace_all("[\r\n\t]", " ") %>%
    str_squish()
}

text_df <- wc_rating_df %>%
  transmute(
    review_id,
    rating_overall,
    employee_length,
    summary = clean_text_for_bert(summary),
    review_pros = clean_text_for_bert(review_pros),
    review_cons = clean_text_for_bert(review_cons),
    advice_to_management = clean_text_for_bert(advice_to_management),
    summary_wc,
    pros_wc,
    cons_wc,
    advice_wc
  )

py_run_string("
from transformers import pipeline

sentiment_pipe = pipeline(
    'sentiment-analysis',
    model='distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english',
    truncation=True
)

def get_sentiment_batch(text_list):
    cleaned = []
    for x in text_list:
        if x is None:
            cleaned.append('')
        else:
            cleaned.append(str(x))
    results = sentiment_pipe(cleaned)
    return results
")
get_distilbert_sentiment <- function(text_vector, batch_size = 32) {
  n <- length(text_vector)
  out_label <- character(n)
  out_score <- numeric(n)

  for (start in seq(1, n, by = batch_size)) {
    end <- min(start + batch_size - 1, n)
    batch <- as.character(text_vector[start:end])
    batch[is.na(batch)] <- ""

    results <- py$get_sentiment_batch(batch)

    for (i in seq_along(results)) {
      out_label[start + i - 1] <- results[[i]]$label
      out_score[start + i - 1] <- results[[i]]$score
    }
  }

  tibble(
    sentiment_label = out_label,
    sentiment_score = out_score
  )
}
summary_sent <- get_distilbert_sentiment(text_df$summary)
pros_sent    <- get_distilbert_sentiment(text_df$review_pros)
cons_sent    <- get_distilbert_sentiment(text_df$review_cons)
advice_sent  <- get_distilbert_sentiment(text_df$advice_to_management)
text_sentiment_df <- text_df %>%
  bind_cols(
    summary_sent %>%
      rename(
        summary_sentiment_label = sentiment_label,
        summary_sentiment_score = sentiment_score
      ),
    pros_sent %>%
      rename(
        pros_sentiment_label = sentiment_label,
        pros_sentiment_score = sentiment_score
      ),
    cons_sent %>%
      rename(
        cons_sentiment_label = sentiment_label,
        cons_sentiment_score = sentiment_score
      ),
    advice_sent %>%
      rename(
        advice_sentiment_label = sentiment_label,
        advice_sentiment_score = sentiment_score
      )
  )
text_sentiment_df <- text_sentiment_df %>%
  mutate(
    summary_sentiment_signed = ifelse(summary_sentiment_label == "POSITIVE",
                                      summary_sentiment_score,
                                      -summary_sentiment_score),
    pros_sentiment_signed = ifelse(pros_sentiment_label == "POSITIVE",
                                   pros_sentiment_score,
                                   -pros_sentiment_score),
    cons_sentiment_signed = ifelse(cons_sentiment_label == "POSITIVE",
                                   cons_sentiment_score,
                                   -cons_sentiment_score),
    advice_sentiment_signed = ifelse(advice_sentiment_label == "POSITIVE",
                                     advice_sentiment_score,
                                     -advice_sentiment_score)
  )

text_sentiment_df
sent_wc_long <- text_sentiment_df %>%
  transmute(
    rating_overall,
    summary_wc, summary_sentiment_signed,
    pros_wc,    pros_sentiment_signed,
    cons_wc,    cons_sentiment_signed,
    advice_wc,  advice_sentiment_signed
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(summary_wc, summary_sentiment_signed,
             pros_wc, pros_sentiment_signed,
             cons_wc, cons_sentiment_signed,
             advice_wc, advice_sentiment_signed),
    names_to = c("column", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(summary|pros|cons|advice)_(wc|sentiment_signed)"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    column = recode(column,
      summary = "Summary",
      pros = "Pros",
      cons = "Cons",
      advice = "Advice"
    ) 
  )

head(sent_wc_long)
ggplot(sent_wc_long, aes(x = wc, y = sentiment_signed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.1, alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ column, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Sentiment vs Word Count by Review Field",
    x = "Word Count",
    y = "Signed DistilBERT Sentiment"
  )

sent_wc_long %>%
  mutate(
    sentiment_type = case_when(
      sentiment_signed > 0 ~ "Positive",
      sentiment_signed < 0 ~ "Negative"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sentiment_type)) %>%
  mutate(
    wc_bin = cut(
      wc,
      breaks = c(0,10,25,50,100,200,500, Inf),
      include.lowest = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  count(column, wc_bin, sentiment_type) %>%
  group_by(column, wc_bin) %>%   # normalize within bin
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = wc_bin, y = prop, fill = sentiment_type)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ column) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Sentiment Composition by Word Count",
    x = "Word Count Bin",
    y = "Proportion"
  )

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

sent_len_long <- text_sentiment_df %>%
  transmute(
    employee_length,
    Summary = summary_sentiment_signed,
    Pros = pros_sentiment_signed,
    Cons = cons_sentiment_signed,
    Advice = advice_sentiment_signed
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(employee_length)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Summary, Pros, Cons, Advice),
    names_to = "column",
    values_to = "sentiment"
  )
sent_len_prop <- sent_len_long %>%
  mutate(
    is_positive = sentiment > 0,
    length_bin = cut(
      employee_length,
      breaks = c(0, 1, 3, 5, 10, 20, Inf),
      labels = c("0-1", "1-3", "3-5", "5-10", "10-20", "20+"),
      include.lowest = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(column, length_bin) %>%
  summarise(p_positive = mean(is_positive), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(sent_len_prop, aes(x = length_bin, y = p_positive)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ column) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of Positive Sentiment by Employee Length",
    x = "Employee Length (years)",
    y = "Proportion Positive"
  )
